examples: She began opening a can of tuna.
Tuna can be grilled, fried or barbecued.
Thick tuna steaks are eaten rare, like beef.
Catching big tuna is about reaffirming your hunter-gatherer instincts, one inch of line at a time.
Pretty slim margins for dishing out meat loaf and Jell-O (or rather, sesame-crusted tuna).
